user.title: OpenWrt MQTT Auto-Discovery
user.description: Configure the MQTT topic prefix for OpenWrt device discovery.

data_description.topic_prefix: The MQTT topic prefix where OpenWrt devices publish their metrics. Use 'openwrt/+/' for multiple devices (+ is a wildcard for any hostname), or 'openwrt/myhostname/' for a single specific device.

init.title: OpenWrt MQTT Options
init.description: Update the MQTT topic prefix configuration.

data_description.topic_prefix: The MQTT topic prefix where OpenWrt devices publish their metrics. Use 'openwrt/+/' for multiple devices (+ is a wildcard for any hostname), or 'openwrt/myhostname/' for a single specific device.
